name: data-conventions
description: The team's opinionated house style for data code: Python tooling (uv), repo layout, processing-library preferences (ocha-lens first), geo stack, marimo idioms. Explicitly advisory — enable where the defaults help, switch off in deliberately-divergent repos. Reading/writing team data at all is the (separate) data-access plugin.

author.name: OCHA Centre for Humanitarian Data — Data Science
